title: Situations Taxonomy File
description: Schema for the situations taxonomy file in the AI Triad Research project. Situation nodes represent DOLCE D&S Situations — contested concepts where all three POV Descriptions classify the same phenomenon differently.

_schema_version.description: Semantic version of the schema this file conforms to.

_doc.description: Human-readable documentation string describing this file's purpose and editing conventions.

last_modified.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the last modification to this file.

nodes.description: Ordered list of situation taxonomy nodes.

SituationNode.description: A situation node representing a DOLCE Situation — a contested concept that all three POV Descriptions classify differently. The interpretations field implements the D&S mechanism: three Descriptions of one Situation.

id.description: Unique identifier for this situation node. Format: cc-{sequence}. The cc- prefix is a legacy stable identifier — do not change.

label.description: Short human-readable title for this situation.

description.description: Genus-differentia description: 'A situation that [differentia]. Encompasses: ... Excludes: ...' — a self-contained paragraph following DOLCE D&S conventions.

interpretations.description: Per-POV interpretations — the DOLCE D&S mechanism. Three Descriptions of one Situation. Each POV explains how it understands this concept.

accelerationist.description: How the accelerationist POV interprets this situation.

safetyist.description: How the safetyist POV interprets this situation.

skeptic.description: How the skeptic POV interprets this situation.

linked_nodes.description: List of POV node IDs that relate to this situation.

conflict_ids.description: List of conflict claim IDs associated with this situation.

disagreement_type.description: Classification of the cross-POV disagreement. definitional: POVs define the concept differently. interpretive: POVs agree on definition but disagree on implications. structural: POVs frame the issue differently at a foundational level.

debate_refs.description: Debate session IDs that referenced this node. Added by harvest.

graph_attributes.description: Rich analytical attributes generated by Invoke-AttributeExtraction. Optional — populated organically.

node_scope.description: AIF-aligned classification of the node's role in argumentation.

epistemic_type.description: The epistemic category of the node's content.

steelman_vulnerability.description: The strongest counterargument(s). String (legacy) or per-POV object.
